zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de la Pole於大約1258年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾卡素時，她的父親Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole61歲，母親Hawise le Strange31歲。她於1274年2月25日與Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1336年5月11日在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾格利費斯托享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de la Pole于大约1258年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾卡素时，她的父亲Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole61岁，母亲Hawise le Strange31岁。她于1274年2月25日与Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1336年5月11日在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾格利費斯托享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Pole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .
Americanized form of German   Pohle   or   Pohl  .

variants.name: Poles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Livio, Primo, Santo.
English and Welsh: variant of Pole and Powell + genitival or excrescent -s.
Italian (Friuli and Veneto): probably a derivative of the personal name   Polo  . It is also found in Slovenia.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de la Pole was born about 1258, in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole, was 61 and her mother, Hawise le Strange, was 31. She married Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin on 25 February 1274, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 11 May 1336, in Griffithstown, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de la Pole est née environ 1258, à Castle, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Hawise le Strange, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin le 25 février 1274, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 mai 1336, à Griffithstown, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de la Pole um 1258 in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole 61 und ihre Mutter Hawise le Strange 31. Sie hat am 25. Februar 1274 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Mai 1336 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Griffithstown, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de la Pole è nata il circa 1258 nel Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Hawise le Strange, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin il 25 febbraio 1274, nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 maggio 1336, nel Griffithstown, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de la Poleが約1258年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアカストルで生まれた時，父Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Poleは61歳，母Hawise le Strangeは31歳であった。1274年2月25日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンでFulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1336年5月11日にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアグリフィスストウンで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de la Pole(이)가 대략 1258년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise le Strange(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1274년 2월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1336년 5월 11일 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 그리피스스타운에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de la Pole nasceu aproximadamente 1258, em Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Hawise le Strange, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin em 25 de fevereiro de 1274, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de maio de 1336, em Griffithstown, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de la Pole родилась около 1258 г. в местности кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Hawise le Strange, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin 25 февраля 1274 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 мая 1336 г. в местности гриффитстоун, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de la Pole nació aproximadamente 1258, en Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Hawise le Strange, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Fulk FitzWarin 1st Baron FitzWarin el 25 de febrero de 1274, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1336, en Griffithstown, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
